title: PowerShell Execution Policy Bypass
description: Detects PowerShell execution policy bypass or unrestricted execution behavior.
query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe"
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-ExecutionPolicy Bypass", "-ep bypass", "Unrestricted")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, ProcessCommandLine
